string.text: Local radiative mushroom. Inedible. However, it has anomalous properties!
%c[ui_gray_2] • Suitable for disposal by a technician. \n \n %C[0.170,170,170] Various spare parts for pistols common in the zone.
%c[ui_gray_2] • Suitable for disposal by a technician. \n \n %C[0.170,170,170] Electronics from various assault rifles. A fairly valuable, although not always necessary thing in repair.
%c[ui_gray_2] • Suitable for disposal by a technician. \n \n %C[0.170,170,170] Various shutters, muzzle brakes and gas outlets - in general, utility for assault rifles of various manufacturers.

Personal chevron of fanatics, in the form of a Gothic cross. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. 
 
 %C[0.140,140,140] Descriptions: 
 %C[0.153,255,255] • %C[0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing

A pack of money. 
 in order to find out their number, it is necessary to use the subject. 
 %C[226,90,0,255] • %C[Default] subject for use. 
 %C[226,90,0,255] • %C[Default] Currency.
